flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at American University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (8.2k → 7.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at American University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.3k → $58.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at American University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.3k → $58.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at American University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
